title: Pricing
meta_description: Simple and transparent pricing for Static Website Generator. Choose the plan that best fits your projects and workflow.
og_description: Explore the pricing plans for Static Website Generator and find the perfect option for your websites.
excerpt: Simple pricing designed for developers, freelancers and agencies.
content:
# Pricing

Static Website Generator offers flexible plans for individuals, freelancers, agencies and growing teams.

## Starter

Perfect for personal websites and small projects.

- Manage one website
- JSON content management
- Astro theme support
- Static site generation

## Professional

Designed for freelancers and professionals managing multiple websites.

- Multiple websites
- Theme import and export
- Documentation and blog support
- AI-assisted content tools

## Agency

Built for agencies and organizations that manage multiple client websites.

- Unlimited websites
- Shared theme library
- Team collaboration
- Priority support

## Need Something Custom?

Contact us to discuss enterprise features, custom integrations and tailored deployment solutions.

data.title: Choose your plan and start building today.
data.subtitle: Start with a free trial or explore the documentation to see how Static Website Generator fits your workflow.
data.note: No credit card required • Cancel anytime • Open Source
